zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bamfield於1604年6月出生在英國英格蘭戴文波爾莫時，他的父親Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP44歲，母親Elizabeth Clifton34歲。他於1629年3月16日與Elizabeth Starre在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1663年12月24日在英國戴文布藍斯可姆享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆聖 文尼福雷達斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bamfield于1604年6月出生在英国英格兰戴文波爾莫时，他的父亲Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP44岁，母亲Elizabeth Clifton34岁。他于1629年3月16日与Elizabeth Starre在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1663年12月24日在英国戴文布藍斯可姆享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆聖 文尼福雷達斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Bamfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Banfield
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Banville in Calvados, Normandy, France. There has been some confusion between this surname and   Bonfield  . In Ireland this is a variant of   Banville  , the original French form of the placename, and now the usual spelling of the surname in Ireland; it is associated primarily with County Wexford.

English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places in England with similar names, such as Bampfylde House in Poltimore, Devon and Bamville Farm in Wheathampstead, Hertfordshire. There may have been some confusion with   Benfield  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bamfield was born in June 1604, in Poltimore, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP, was 44 and his mother, Elizabeth Clifton, was 34. He married Elizabeth Starre on 16 March 1629, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 24 December 1663, in Branscombe, Devon, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Starre le 16 mars 1629, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 24 décembre 1663, à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bamfieldが1604年6月にイギリスイギリスデボンポルティモーで生まれた時，父Sir Amyas Bampfylde MPは44歳，母Elizabeth Cliftonは34歳であった。1629年3月16日にイギリスイギリスデボンでElizabeth Starreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1663年12月24日にイギリスデボンブランスコンベで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベスト ウィニフレド'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Eas: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브 스트 윈이프레드'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: William Bamfield(이)가 1604년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 포팀어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Clifton(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1629년 3월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Elizabeth Starre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1663년 12월 24일 영국 데폰 브랜스코브에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브 스트 윈이프레드'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Bamfield nasceu em junho de 1604, em Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Clifton, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Starre em 16 de março de 1629, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de dezembro de 1663, em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Eas: ст винифред'с чурч, бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bamfield родился июнь 1604 г. в местности полтимор, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Amyas Bampfylde MP было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Clifton, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Starre 16 марта 1629 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 24 декабря 1663 г. в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности ст винифред'с чурч, бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания.
